nasb.text: But as soon as Jeremiah, whom the Lord their God had sent, had finished telling all the people all the words of the Lord their God—that is, all these words—

esv.text: When Jeremiah finished speaking to all the people all these words of the Lord their God, with which the Lord their God had sent him to them,

cnv.text: 耶利米向眾民說完了耶和華他們的　神吩咐他的一切話，就是耶和華他們的　神差遣他去對他們說的一切話。

ccb.text: 耶利米向众人宣告了他们的上帝耶和华的话，就是他们的上帝耶和华派他去说的一切话。
